# TravelDataLab

> Data-driven travel guides for ski resorts across the US and Canada.

TravelDataLab provides comprehensive, data-backed guides to 30 ski resorts. Our content covers terrain stats, weather patterns, hotel recommendations by budget, gear reviews, and resort-vs-resort comparisons.

## Ski Resort Guides
We cover 30 ski destinations organized by region:
- Colorado: Vail, Breckenridge, Aspen Snowmass, Steamboat, Telluride, Keystone, Copper Mountain, Winter Park
- Utah: Park City, Deer Valley, Snowbird, Alta, Brighton, Sundance
- California: Mammoth Mountain, Palisades Tahoe, Heavenly, Northstar
- Montana/Wyoming: Big Sky, Jackson Hole
- Northeast: Stowe, Killington, Sunday River, Sugarbush, Jay Peak
- Canada: Whistler Blackcomb, Banff Sunshine, Lake Louise, Mont Tremblant, Sun Peaks

Each resort page includes: skiable acreage, vertical drop, trail count, terrain difficulty breakdown, snowfall data, nearest airport, best months to visit, and 3-4 hotel recommendations across budget tiers.

## Weather Data
Monthly weather data for all 30 resorts including average high/low temperatures, snowfall inches, and snow days. Helps travelers choose the optimal month for their trip.

## Hotel Recommendations
97 hotels reviewed across all 30 destinations, organized by budget tier ($-$$$$) with ski-in/ski-out status, distance to slopes, amenities, and price per night estimates.

## Resort Comparisons
15 head-to-head resort comparisons (e.g. Vail vs Park City, Whistler vs Vail) covering terrain, snow quality, value, dining, accessibility, and family friendliness.

## Gear Guides
Expert-tested ski gear reviews: goggles, helmets, jackets, base layers, and packing lists with specific product recommendations.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://www.traveldatalab.com
- All Resorts: https://www.traveldatalab.com/ski
- Resort Example: https://www.traveldatalab.com/ski/vail
- Comparisons: https://www.traveldatalab.com/ski/compare
- Gear Guides: https://www.traveldatalab.com/gear/ski
- All Guides: https://www.traveldatalab.com/guides
